raw_text: Mattermost versions 11.3.x < = 11.3.0, 11.2.x < = 11.2.2, 10.11.x < = 10.11.10 fail to canonicalize IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses before reserved IP validation which allows an attacker to perform SSRF attacks against internal services via IPv4-mapped IPv6 literals (e.g., [::ffff:127.0.0.1]).. Mattermost Advisory ID: MMSA-2026-00585
